titleStmt.title: SII 26.407: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 407. (A.R. No. 386 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva: Year 31 or 1100-01 or 1103-04 A.D.

summary.p: This damaged inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc. It mentions the queen Avaṉimuḷuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records a sale of land, 1250 kuḻi in extent, as tax-free dēvadāna for the tirupaḷḷiyeḻuchchi service and offerings at it to the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of the same Śiṟṟiṅgūr occuring in Nos. 406 etc., above, by the sabhai of the place. The land was purchased by a certain [••• •••] laiyan alias [••• •••] jēndraśōḻa-vāṇakularājaṉ Agamuḍaiyān who endowed the same for the above mentioned purpose. It records also a gift of an eating plate (parikalam) for use in carrying food offerings at the time of the service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara
Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai mannavar Iriyaluṟṟi
ḻitarat tikkaṉaittut tancakkara naṭātti vijaiyaabhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṁhāsa- ṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭai
yāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāna tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa
devarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4āvatu malāṭāna jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam ciṟṟiṅ
kūr sabhaiyom Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavadevaṟku tiruppaḷḷieḻuccikkum tirumañcaṇak kuṭa mañcukkum
cāttiyaruḷit tiruvamutaricikkum kaṟiyamutu kku neyyamutukku ceviṭaraiyum tayiramuturikku Aṭaikkā
yamutu pākku nā m veṟṟilai Amutu pattukkum mutu Arici nānāḻikkuc cantirātittavaṟ nivantamā
kat tirumuṉaippāṭi laiyanāṉa jentracoḻa vāṇakularājaṉ Akamu
ṭaiyān Uṭaiyān It Iṟaiili devatāṉamāka koṇṭu viṭṭanilam patiṉaṟu cāṇ kolā
l Āyirattu Irunūṟṟampatukku Iruñcicey koṉṟamañci teṉ kūṟum Āka Āyi
rattirunūṟṟaimpatukku Iṟaiili devatāṉamāka vilaiporuḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu kuṭuttom sabhai
yom Issantikku Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku Iṭṭa parikalam Onṟināl Iṭai muppatu panmāheśva
rarakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.407 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
